tests.expected_output: A compile summary showing planned wiki page updates/creates, then after approval, executing changes with all 4 index updates and source marking
assertions: Does the output explicitly update the raw subfolder index (raw/youtube/index.md) to reflect the compilation?
Does the output update at least one wiki subfolder index (e.g. wiki/reference/index.md or wiki/people/index.md)?
Does the output update master wiki/index.md entry counts?
Does the output append an entry to wiki/log.md with the compile log format?
Does the output mark the raw source frontmatter with compiled: true and compiled-date?

tests.expected_output: Compile summary for a meeting source, with person page updates, work page updates, and all index+log updates
assertions: Does the compile summary present a clear approve/skip/edit prompt before making changes?
Does the output update raw/meetings/index.md (the raw subfolder index for this source type)?
Does the output check for existing wiki pages before creating new ones (merge not duplicate)?
Does the output append to wiki/log.md with source path, updated pages, created pages, and indexes listed?
Does the output mark the raw source with compiled: true in frontmatter after all updates are done?

tests.expected_output: Compile a TLDR source, updating relevant wiki pages and all 4 index points
assertions: Does the output update raw/tldrs/index.md (the raw subfolder index for this TLDR)?
Does the output update the master wiki/index.md entry counts if any new pages were created?
Does the output present the compile summary BEFORE executing changes (not after)?
Does the output call the MiniMax compile worker script as the first step?
Are all 4 index update points (wiki subfolder, raw subfolder, master index, wiki/log.md) explicitly mentioned or executed in the output?
